checkedClaims.claimText: Discriminating questions are then selected by expected information gain, `IG(q) = H(F) - sum_a P(a | q) H(F | a)`, which is the reduction in frontier uncertainty expected from asking question `q` [SETTLES-2009].
checkedClaims.normalizedClaim: discriminating questions are then selected by expected information gain ig q h f - sum a p a q h f a which is the reduction in frontier uncertainty expected from asking question q settles-2009
checkedClaims.note: Verified against a manually waived bootstrap source because automated source extraction is not yet reliable for this reference.
checkedClaims.supportSnippet: The survey explains active learning as strategic query selection under labeling cost, including information-based query criteria.
